reasoning: The question asks if there will be 8 or more cuts of 25 basis points (i.e. 200 bps total) during 2025. Based on news reports from September and October 2025, the Fed made its first rate cut of 2025 in September (25 bps) and its second in October (25 bps), bringing the federal funds rate down to 3.75%–4.00%. The market price on Polymarket for this question was 0.00 on October 30. With only the December meeting left in 2025, it would require an additional 150 bps of cuts (6 cuts of 25 bps) by or in December. This is highly improbable and essentially mathematically/practically impossible short of a massive emergency intervention to stave off total financial collapse. Accordingly, I assess the probability at the minimum allowed limit of 2%.
